title: mentha × schultziana var. submollis
intro: Mentha × schultziana var. submollis, also known as the mint or bergamot mint, is a variety of the peppermint plant, which is a hybrid of spearmint and watermint. This plant is known for its unique characteristic of having a strong minty flavor and aroma, often used in culinary and medicinal purposes. The medicinal properties of Mentha × schultziana var. submollis include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to relieve digestive issues, headaches, and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils.
